title: Atila iAMP COVID-19 Detection Kit - Saliva
author: Opentrons

steps.title: The pipettes will access each tuberack...
steps.instruction: The pipettes will access each tuberack by column (A1, B1, C1, A2, B2, C2...), meaning a 94 sample run would have all tube racks in slots 1-6 filled, with 4 tubes in A1, B1, C1, A2 of slot 7. * If running a full plate (94 samples), the protocol will use the multi-channel pipette to dispense mastermix to all 96 wells. If running less than 94 samples, say 12 for example, the protocol will use the multi-channel to dispense mastermix into the first column, then the single channel to dispense the first four wells of column 2, then finally mastermix into G12, H

steps.title: Note, in this example, that the...
steps.instruction: Note, in this example, that the pipette will be taking mastermix from whichever column it is taking from (1 or 2, dependent on the number of samples running), in which case extra mastermix should be provided for the first four wells of column

steps.title: Explanation of complex parameters below
steps.instruction: Explanation of complex parameters below: * `Number of Samples (1-94)`: Specify the number of samples for this run (1-94). * `Reaction plate`: Specify whether using the non-skirted or half-skirted reaction plate on slot

steps.title: Slot 8 should always use a non-skirted plate
steps.instruction: Slot 8 should always use a non-skirted plate. * `P20/P300 Pipette Mounts`: Specify which mount (left or right) to host each pipette. ---

steps.title: Mastermix is added to the reaction...
steps.instruction: Mastermix is added to the reaction plate up to the number of samples specified.

steps.title: Samples are added to the mastermix wells from the tuberack(s)
steps.instruction: Samples are added to the mastermix wells from the tuberack(s).

steps.title: Controls are added to G12 and...
steps.instruction: Controls are added to G12 and H12 of the reaction plate.
